text.title: Backlog Management Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Backlog Management.

example.scenario: Solo founder with 180-item Linear backlog and 4 items/week throughput; ratio = 45× → cut to Now (8) + Next (12) + Icebox (24); grooming Mondays 30 min.
